title: MedinovAI Data Lineage Record
description: Complete audit trail showing where data came from and how it shaped model behavior. Governance control GOV-07.

data_source_id.description: Unique identifier for this data source. Format: DS-<ALPHANUMERIC>. Example: DS-LABRESULTS001.

source_name.description: Human-readable name of the data source.

collection_method.description: How data is collected from the source.

consent_basis.description: Legal basis for collecting and using this data.

consent_reference.description: Reference to the consent document, IRB approval, or legal authority.

retention_period.description: How long data is retained. Examples: '7 years', '10 years post-study', 'indefinite'.

disposal_method.description: How data is disposed of after retention period.

regulatory_basis.description: Regulation requiring this retention period. Examples: 'HIPAA 6-year minimum', '21 CFR Part 11'.

transformations.description: Ordered list of transformations applied to this data, from raw source to model-ready state.

step.description: Sequential step number in the transformation pipeline.

step_name.description: Human-readable name of this transformation step.

tool.description: Tool or script that performed this transformation. Examples: 'etl-pipeline-v2', 'deidentification-service', 'feature-engineering-script'.

description.description: What this transformation does in plain language.

input_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the input data to this step. Enables integrity verification.

output_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the output data from this step.

input_record_count.description: Number of records entering this step.

output_record_count.description: Number of records after this step.

records_filtered.description: Number of records removed during this step (difference between input and output).

filter_reason.description: Why records were filtered, if any.

phi_handling.description: How PHI was handled in this step.

consuming_models.description: Models that consume this data source for training or inference.

model_id.description: Model ID from the Model Risk Register (GOV-01).

usage_type.description: How the model uses this data.

data_version.description: Version or snapshot of the data used by this model.

first_used.description: When this model first consumed this data source.

quality_metrics.description: Data quality metrics for this source.

completeness_pct.description: Percentage of non-null values in required fields.

freshness_sla.description: Maximum acceptable age of data. Examples: '1 hour', '24 hours', '7 days'.

last_updated.description: When data was last refreshed from source.

created_at.description: When this lineage record was created.

updated_at.description: When this lineage record was last updated.
